mapper.sql: select p.plan_id, p.term_id, p.textbook_id, p.course_id, p.grade_id, p.class_id, p.plan_quantity, p.distributed_quantity, p.plan_status, p.create_by, p.create_time, p.update_by, p.update_time, p.remark, t.term_name, tb.textbook_name, c.course_name, g.grade_name, cl.class_name from sc_textbook_plan p left join sc_school_term t on p.term_id = t.term_id left join sc_textbook tb on p.textbook_id = tb.textbook_id left join sc_course c on p.course_id = c.course_id left join sc_grade g on p.grade_id = g.grade_id left join sc_class cl on p.class_id = cl.class_id
mapper.insert: insert into sc_textbook_plan (term_id, textbook_id, course_id, grade_id, class_id, plan_quantity, distributed_quantity, plan_status, create_by, create_time, remark) values (#{termId}, #{textbookId}, #{courseId}, #{gradeId}, #{classId}, #{planQuantity}, #{distributedQuantity}, #{planStatus}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.delete:
delete from sc_textbook_plan where plan_id in
#{planId}
